qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Database table by name is given below. What is the output of the following SQL query? SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT Borrower, Bank_Manager FROM Loan_Records) AS S NATURAL JOIN (SELECT Bank_Manager, Loan_Amount FROM Loan_Records) AS T ); A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Which of the following statements are TRUE about an SQL query? P : An SQL query can contain a HAVING clause even if it does not have a GROUP BY clause Q : An SQL query can contain a HAVING clause only if it has a GROUP BY clause R : All attributes used in the GROUP BY clause must appear in the SELEC

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Consider the following relations and How many tuples does the result of the following SQL query contain? SELECT A.Id FROM A WHERE A.Age > ALL (SELECT B.Age FROM B WHERE B.Name = `Arun') A. B. C. D.
